banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MARCH 2)
banner.subtitle: Official Notice Inside — 7 Gulf Countries Affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has officially postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. New dates to be announced after review on March 3.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

status.details: Suspended all operations to/from Dubai due to multiple regional airspace closures until 1500 UAE time Tue Mar 3. Rebook on/before 20 Mar or request refund.
Operations suspended to/from Dubai due to airspace closures; check FlyDubai advisories (prior end time was Mar 2 15:00 UAE time).
Flights suspended due to regional situation; check Air Arabia advisories (prior end time was Mar 2 15:00 UAE time).
Operations suspended until 14:00 UAE time Mar 2. Passengers with bookings made before Feb 28 can rebook free until Mar 15.

Flight operations temporarily suspended due to closure of Qatari airspace. Operations will resume once Qatar Civil Aviation Authority announces safe reopening. Next update promised by 09:00 Doha time on Mar 3.
IndiGo suspended flights to/from Middle East until 23:59 IST Mar 2 (per earlier advisory).
Air India cancellations/waivers for select Middle East and some Europe/US flights; Gulf region suspensions previously stated until 23:59 IST Mar 2 with rebooking/refunds (per Air India update).
Earlier advisory indicated Gulf suspensions until 23:59 IST Mar 2; check airline channels for latest as advisory page is currently not showing disruption details.
All flight operations suspended until further notice; passengers must not travel to the airport and should contact their airline for updates.
All flight operations suspended until further notice; passengers must not travel to the airport and should contact their airline for updates.
Operations impacted by closure of Qatari airspace; follow airline/airport guidance for updates.
Expect cancellations/diversions due to regional airspace restrictions. Check with airlines.
Potential delays/cancellations due to airspace restrictions. Check with airlines.
Operations may be disrupted. Check with airlines and airport authority.
Operations may be disrupted. Check with airlines.

advisories.title: MEA Advisory: Foreign nationals in India
advisories.summary: MEA advises foreign nationals currently in India and facing visa/immigration issues due to flight disruptions to contact FRRO for extension/regularisation.

advisories.title: DGCA High-Risk Airspace Advisory
advisories.summary: DGCA advised Indian operators to avoid airspaces of 11 countries/FIRs (incl. Iran, Israel, UAE, Saudi, Qatar) effective immediately until March 2, 2026 unless superseded.

advisories.title: UAE Ministry of Education distance learning (Mar 2–4)
advisories.summary: UAE Ministry of Education directed all schools to shift to distance learning Mar 2–4; school transport and activities suspended.

resources.name: Kerala NORKA Helpdesk
resources.details: NORKA department helpdesk for Gulf expatriates seeking assistance.
